case_title: DIANA VOLLMER VS. KITCHEN WORKS INC et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-11-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COMMERCIAL RECOVERY INCORPORATED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VOLLMER, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT KITCHEN WORKS INC COMMERCIAL RECOVERY INCORPORATED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL FILED BY VOLLMER, DIANA KITCHEN WORKS INC COMMERCIAL RECOVERY INCORPORATED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING IS GRANTED. -PATRICK B. STREB, PRO TEM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-21-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-11-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KITCHEN WORKS INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOLLMER, DIANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KITCHEN WORKS INC *** DEFENDANT COMMERCIAL RECOVERY INC., IS DISMISSED. (THIS IS NOT A CONSUMER DEBT BECAUSE IT WAS INCURRED FOR A BUSINESS PURPOSE.) THE MECHANIC'S LIEN RECORDED ON 8/8/08, FOR $8,700 IS INVALID BECAUSE KITCHEN WORKS AGREED TO WAIT 12 MONHTS BEFORE PAYMENT WAS DUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT KITCHEN WORKS INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOLLMER, DIANA
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FROM JUL-21-2009 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON MAY-29-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID HUARD. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-22-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY ALL PARTIES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR EITHER DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT KITCHEN WORKS, INC. DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AND RETURN WITH PROOF OF SERVICE FROM THE MARIN COUNTY SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO COMMERCIAL RECOVERY INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-22-2009 AT 1:30PM. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
